g.text: Main Flow: Withdraw Exceeds Daily Limit (TC-2)
Main Flow: Withdraw Exactly Daily Limit (TC-3)
pre = Pre1 (user has active account with positive balance)
post = Post1 (state change, user receives approval/update)
generateDeclineMessage("Amount exceeds balance or daily limit")
Error Path: Both Balance and Daily Limit Zero
generateDeclineMessage("Both balance and daily limit are zero")
Error Path: Cumulative Daily Calculation Error
showDeclineMessage("Withdrawal cannot be processed due to system error")
showUnauthorizedMessage("You do not have permission to perform this operation")
nfr_fact_usability_distinct_channel_kinds: all disj c1, c2 | c1.kind != c2.kind
showErrorMessage("Each channel must have different kind")
